blended.narrative: Mont Orford is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.0 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 167 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
